meaning: 大庆[黑龙江省](旧译 Taching)
examples: This heroic utterance by Comrade Wang Jinxi voices the lofty aspirations of the workers and caders of Daqing and their families.
Please give me a little information about the trains to Daqing.
Daqing is in the north of China and it has the population of more than 2.7 million.
Thereabouts, on clear nights, they will see a comet known as Ikeya-Zhang, after its co-discoverers, Kaoru Ikeya, of Japan, and Zhang Daqing, of China.
In April the government said it would let Yukos, an oil company, build a pipeline from the oilfields near Angarsk, said to be as big as Kuwait's, to Daqing in China.
